testcase.name: test_royal_line_cluster_loads

failure.message: selenium.common.exceptions.NoSuchElementException: Message: Cannot locate option with value: cluster:royal; For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#nosuchelementexception

testcase.failure: tests/test_genealogy_visualization.py:168: in test_royal_line_cluster_loads select.select_by_value('cluster:royal') test-env/lib/python3.14/site-packages/selenium/webdriver/support/select.py:85: in select_by_value raise NoSuchElementException(f"Cannot locate option with value: {value}") E selenium.common.exceptions.NoSuchElementException: Message: Cannot locate option with value: cluster:royal; For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#nosuchelementexception
